meta.description: Structured resume of Prasad Gade based on the public resume

basics.name: Prasad Gade
basics.label: Data Scientist & Computer Engineer
basics.summary: Data Scientist and Computer Engineer from Mumbai, India. B.Tech student at Sardar Patel Institute of Technology (CGPA 9.26/10). Builds data pipelines, ML models, and interactive web applications.

education.institution: Bhartiya Vidya Bhavan's Sardar Patel Institute of Technology
education.minor: Management from SPJIMR (S. P. Jain Institute of Management & Research)

highlights: Learned Data Analysis and Business Intelligence using Power BI
Delivered a sales dashboard for North Wind Traders, improving data visibility by 70%

projects.name: UPI Analytics Platform
highlights: Processed 9,026 JSON files from 3 sources across 788 districts/42 months using a 4-stage medallion pipeline into a DuckDB star schema
Quantified market duopoly via HHI, measured geographic inequality using Gini coefficients, segmented adoption tiers with K-Means across 788 districts
Forecasted UPI volumes using Prophet/ARIMA; delivered 68 visualizations across 11-tab Streamlit + Power BI dashboards, validated by 83 tests

projects.name: Lex Simulacra
projects.description: AI-Powered Legal Courtroom Simulator with Multi-Agent RAG
highlights: Built an 8-agent legal simulation achieving 99% citation accuracy via a LangGraph workflow
Reduced legal research time by 75% across 100K+ documents with RAG pipeline and BM25 re-ranking
Achieved 3.2x context relevance gain and 60% engagement boost via context compression and hallucination detection

projects.name: Comparative Analysis of ML/DL Models for Intrusion Detection
projects.description: Benchmarking ML/DL models on TII-SSRC-23 dataset
highlights: Achieved 99.99% recall and 100% precision benchmarking 6 models on 8.6M-sample dataset
Demonstrated tree models were 12.8x faster with 20x inference throughput
Reduced classification errors by 30% via hybrid SMOTE-undersampling

certifications.name: Introduction to Cloud Computing on AWS

achievements.title: Winner — Tech Horizon National Hackathon
achievements.description: Secured 1st place out of 80+ national teams in a 36-hour hackathon by designing a full-stack donation platform (KindHearts).
